duplicate_or_overlapping_page_risks.resolution: Use governance-domain canonical pages and link from organization indexes; do not create duplicate organization-domain pages.

unresolved_path_decisions: Five lore candidate outputs remain conceptual and require final canonical paths after canon-source review.
Scoped incident pages remain unnamed and require event-identity and evidence review before path assignment.

dependencies.dependency_rule: Defer pages requiring PR #15; do not silently copy unmerged Discord or Council archival evidence.

acceptance_clarifications: Evidence packets are required before drafting.
Human semantic review is required before merge, not before draft-branch authoring.
At least 70 percent of Wave 2A outputs must be R1 or R2.
No R4 page is authorized for Wave 2A and no R5 material may enter knowledge/.
